title: Bitter Crunchy Midnight Indian Lamb Stir-fry
description: A midnight craving dish featuring lamb shanks in a bitter and crunchy sauce with rest and keto-friendly options.

ingredients.name: tamarind paste
ingredients.notes: soaked in hot water to make a tamarind sauce base

instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Season lamb shanks with salt and pepper.
Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add lamb shanks and sear until browned on all sides, about 8 minutes per side.
Transfer lamb to an oven-safe dish and roast at 375°F (190°C) for about 20-25 minutes or until meat is tender and easily pierced with a fork.
In the same skillet, add sliced onions and sauté until translucent. Stir in minced ginger and garlic; cook for another minute.
Stir in tamarind sauce base, tomato puree, ground cumin, and enough water to reach a thin gravy consistency. Simmer for 5 minutes.
Add roasted lamb shanks back into the skillet with the sauce. Cook for an additional 10-12 minutes until heated through.
Garnish with fresh curry leaves and finely chopped peppers if using. Serve hot as a keto-friendly midnight craving dish.
